sellers_note: Discover the exceptional 2023 Volkswagen Tiguan 2.0T SE R-Line Black, a remarkable SUV that seamlessly blends style, performance, and advanced technology. This striking vehicle is the perfect companion for the discerning driver who demands both sophistication and capability.Equipped with a robust 2.0L TSI DOHC engine and an 8-Speed Automatic with Tiptronic transmission, the Tiguan delivers a thrilling and efficient driving experience, with an impressive EPA-estimated 21 city / 28 highway MPG. Elevate your commute or weekend adventures with the Tiguan's impressive all-wheel-drive system, providing exceptional traction and control in any conditions.- Perforated V-Tex Leatherette Seating Surfaces- Heated Front Comfort Seats- Power Liftgate- Panoramic Sunroof- 19'' Black Painted Twin 5-Spoke Alloy WheelsThe Tiguan's impeccable exterior design is complemented by a wealth of premium features, including a sleek black painted grille, bold R-Line styling cues, and a commanding presence on the road. Step inside the cabin and you'll be greeted by a refined, tech-savvy environment, with a MIB3 Composition Media infotainment system, a premium audio setup, and a host of advanced safety technologies.Versatility is at the heart of the Tiguan, with a spacious and flexible interior that adapts to your every need. Fold down the split-folding rear seats to maximize cargo capacity, or take advantage of the convenient power liftgate for effortless loading and unloading. Whether you're embarking on a family road trip or tackling your daily errands, the Tiguan is ready to handle it all with ease.Safety is also a top priority in the Tiguan, with a comprehensive suite of driver-assistance features, including Blind Spot Monitoring, Rear Traffic Alert, and Automatic Emergency Braking. Rest assured, you and your loved ones will enjoy the utmost protection on every journey.Experience the exceptional 2023 Volkswagen Tiguan 2.0T SE R-Line Black for yourself. Schedule a test drive today and discover the perfect blend of style, performance, and technology that will elevate your driving experience to new heights. The Satisfaction Leader Since 1973. Our Difference is the Key!
